headline: WTW Reports First Quarter 2026 Earnings
summary: Revenue1 increased 8% from prior year to $2.4 billion for the quarterOrganic Revenue growth of 3% for the quarter Diluted Earnings per Share was $3.10 for the quarter, up 33% over prior yearAdjusted Diluted Earnings per Share was $3.72 for the quarter, up 19% over prior yearOperating Margin was 18.6% for the quarter, down 80 basis points from prior yearAdjusted Operating Margin was 22.3% for the quarter, up 70 basis points from prior year LONDON, April 30, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- WTW (NASDAQ: W
